text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I've come out to watch some scrimmages, and
while I'm waiting for the next one to start...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Excuse me. May I ask you for some advice?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Yes. I have checked the weather and track
conditions and reviewed my opponent's records
to see where they usually make their move...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I have also planned different positions to take
during the race so I can handle any and all
unforeseen circumstances.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
One would think my preparations for this race are
more than sufficient, yet something still feels
amiss...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
If it means I can increase my chances of winning
by even one percent, then I want to explore that
possibility as thoroughly as possible.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
What do you think is the most important thing to
do before a race? I would appreciate your
thoughts.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I do that already, of course... Wait, are you
saying I should train even more?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I see. One must train until the very last moment.
All this time, my resolve was lacking. You've
opened my eyes to a new perspective.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I suppose the best I can do now is some weight
training. I will go to the gym immediately!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
In any case, warming up my body shouldn't do me
any harm.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for the advice. Now, if you'll excuse
me.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I never fail to do that in the first place.
Comparative research is vital to discussions. Past
race analysis and—

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Wait... You mean I should watch the races
immediately before my own? I do need to
understand the turf condition for my
calculations...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
But I won't be able to view them from different
angles. I should ask permission to go up the
watchtower... No, that's going too far.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Oh, forgive me for ignoring you. I appreciate your
input on the matter. I'm sure it will be of great
use.
